You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Area of Research Interest: Digital Signal Processing and Digital Communication Education and Qualification: No. Degree Year University/Institute Division Specialization 1. A.M.I.E. 1988 The Institution of Engineers (India) Second Electronics & Communication Engg. 2. M.E. 1991 Anna University, Madras First Electronics Engineering 3. Ph.D. 2017 Devi Ahilya University, Indore - Electronics Engineering M.E. Dissertation Title: “Heart rate Monitor – QRS detection using Simple Threshold and implementation with Median filters” Ph.D. Title: “ Soft Computing techniques applied to the design of digital filters” Work Experience: (a) Academic / Teaching Experience and subjects taught (i) As lecturer in Department of Electronics Engineering, at S.S.V.P.S. College of Engineering (CoE), Dhule, (Maharashtra), from 26/08/1991 to 23/04/1993. Subjects Taught: Linear Circuit Analysis, Electronic Devices and Circuits-I , II (ii) As lecturer in Department of Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering at S.G.S.I.T.S., Indore from 04/05/1993 to 16/06/2005. Subjects Taught: Basic Electronics, Analog Electronics, Electronic Design, Electronics Measurements, Electromagnetic Fields and Waves, Transmission Lines and Wave Filters, Microwave Engineering, (iii) As Associate professor in Department of Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering at S.G.S.I.T.S., Indore from 09/10/2003 to 22/07/2017 Subjects Taught: Communication Engineering, Digital Communication, Digital Signal Processing, Information Theory and Coding. (iv) As Professor in Department of Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering at S.G.S.I.T.S., Indore from 22/07/2017 to till date Subjects Taught: Mobile Communication, Applied DSP, Signals & Systems. (b) Relevant Administrative Experience (i) Head of the Department since 01/12/2018 to till date. (ii) Superintendent of Exam (June 2022) (i) Deputy Controller, Exams, S.G.S.I.T.S., Indore from 15/11/2006 to 01/07/2009 (c) Other Academic cum Administrative Experiences and Positions Held (i) 1. Assistant Superintendent, Exams 2. Tabulator, Exams 3. OSD, Revaluation, Question Paper Typing, Exams 4. OSD, Scrutiny 5. OSD, Coding and Decoding (ii) 1. Convener, Inaugural Function, AAYAAM 2k13 and Member, Cultural Committee 2. Convener, Inaugural Function, AAYAAM 2k14 and Member, Cultural Committee 3. Coordinator, AAYAAM 2k17 4. Coordinator, AAYAAM 2k18 5. Coordinator, Induction Program, February, 2018 6. Coordinator, Induction Program, August, 2018 7. Coordinator, Induction Program, 2019 8. Coordinator, Induction Program, 2020 9. Coordinator, Induction Program, 2021 Research Details: (a) Post Graduates/Ph. D. Scholar Guidance: Details of M.E. Dissertations guided S.No. Name of Scholar (Session) University/ Institution Topics 1. Atharva Bhaskar (2016-17) RGPV, Bhopal Development of flaw detection techniques in Non-destructive testing using GPU 2. Abhishek Tomar (2015-16) RGPV, Bhopal Design of Quadrature mirror filter bank using Particle swarm Optimization(PSO) 3. Sumit Ganvir (2014-15) RGPV, Bhopal Real time implementation of fuzzy adaptive step size LMS algorithm (FASS-LMS) on TMS 320C6713 kit 4. Aditya Vikram Singh (2014-15) RGPV, Bhopal Implementation of Voice excited linear predictive coding (VELP) on TMS 320C6713 DSK and noise cancellation using LMS algorithm 5. Pradeep Kumar Pethari (2013-14) RGPV, Bhopal Adaptive Equalization using decision feedback equalizer (DFE) 6. Suneel Kumar Soni (2013-14) RGPV, Bhopal Implementation of LMS and NLMS Adaptive filter on TMS 320C6713 DSK for noise cancellation and its performance analysis 7. Saurabh Rai (2012-13) RGPV, Bhopal Digital filter implementation using TMS 320C6713 DSK 8. Ravi Kateeyare (2012-13) RGPV, Bhopal Performance evaluation of UWB-IR system 9. Shobha Shakya (2011-12) RGPV, Bhopal Channel estimation using low rank LMMSE estimator 10. Geetesh Kwatra (2011-12) RGPV, Bhopal Optimization of channel capacity with different CSI in MIMO system under fading environment 11. Ramayan Pratap Singh Parihar (2010-11) RGPV, Bhopal System Identification using adaptive modeling using LMS and NLMS algorithms 12. Surya Prakash Pandey (2010-11) RGPV, Bhopal Mitigating inter carrier interference in OFDM system using self cancellation scheme 13. Sarita Khatarkar (2009-10) RGPV, Bhopal LMS, NLMS and RLS based adaptive linear prediction 14. Ranbeer Tyagi (2009-10) RGPV, Bhopal Image compression using DPCM with LMS algorithm 15. Venkatappareddy.p (2008-09) RGPV, Bhopal A Novel optimization (PSO) method for the design of optimal digital filter 16. Umesh Naik (2008-09) RGPV, Bhopal Acoustic echo cancellation for hands-free communication system 17. Rupesh Dubey (2007-08) RGPV, Bhopal Implementation of BPSK transmitter and receiver on C6713 DSP Processor 18. Patil Deepak Pandurang (2006-07) RGPV, Bhopal FPGA implementation of Reed-Solomon Error Correcting code 19. Kamlesh Gupta (2006-07) RGPV, Bhopal Implementation and performance comparison of Adaptive linear transversal eualizers 20. M.R. N. Tagore (2005-06) RGPV, Bhopal Performance evaluation of Multi-band spectral subtraction method for speech enhancement 21. Chirag Pahunwala (2005-06) RGPV, Bhopal Resolving rightful ownership with invisible watermarking techniques in spatial and transform domain 22. R. Narendra Prasad (2004-05) RGPV, Bhopal Adaptive Telephone Echo Cancellation 23. Avinash K. Thakur (2003-04) RGPV, Bhopal Study and implementation of JPEG Codec PhD Supervision: Name of Scholar University Year of Registration Role Sheetal Ganorkar (QIP) RGPV 2020 Supervisor Divya Dubey RGPV 2021 Supervisor Shruchi Jain RGPV 2021 Co-Supervisor Shubham Srivastava DAVV 2018 Co-Supervisor Publications: Technical Papers Publications Details of Research paper Publications: International Journal: S.No. Title of Research Paper Name of Journal and Year/Issue No. 1. Design of Linear-Phase Digital FIR Filter Using Differential Evolution Optimization with an Improved Ripple Constraint Handling Method BIJIT ( BVICAM’s International Journal of Information Technology ) Vol. 7, Issue. 1, Jan.-June 2015, pp.835-840, ISSN No. 0973-5658 2. Design of discrete-time Linear phase FIR filter and Differentiator using Particle Swarm Optimization IJCEE ( InternationalJournal of Computer and Electronics Engineering ) (ISSN No. 0975-4202)Vol. 2, Issue 1, pp. 1-12, Jan. 2010 National Journal: S.No. Title of Research Papers Name of Journal and Year/Issue No. 1. Implementation of Voice Excited Linear Predictive (VELP) Coding on TMS320C6713 DSP Kit The IUP Journal of Telecommunications , (ISSN No. 0975-5551) Vol.7, No. 4, pp. 38-49, Nov. 2015. 2. Performance Comparison of Teaching-Learning-Based Optimization and Particle Swarm Optimization Algorithms Applied to the Design of Adaptive Channel Equalizer IUP Journal of Telecommunication , (ISSN No. 0975-5551) Vol. 7 , No. 3, pp. 7-28, Aug. 2015. 3. Real-time Implementation of Variable Step Size LMS Adaptive Filtering Algorithm The IUP Journal of Electrical and Electronics Engineering, (ISSN No. 0974-1704), Vol.8, No. 3, pp. 7-16, July 2015. 4. Performance Comparison of Teaching-Learning-Based Optimization and Differential Evolution Algorithms Applied to the Design of Linear Phase Digital FIR Filter IUP Journal of Telecommunication, (ISSN No. 0975-5551) Vol. 7 , No. 1, pp 16-31, Feb. 2015. 5. Image compression using DPCM with LMS Algorithm Journal of Communication and Computer 8, pp. 490-493, June 2011 6. Design of FIR digital filters using particle swarm optimization Journal of the Institution of Engineers (India) ET, (ISSN No. 0251-1096), Vol. 91, pp. 11-19, 2010. 7. Simulation of adaptive filter used for echo cancellation Journal of the Institution of Engineers (India) ET, (ISSN No. 0251-1096), Vol. 88, pp. 64-69, 2007. International/National Conference Publications Shital Ganorkar, Shekhar Sharma, Anjana Jain, Implementation of FIR Adaptive Filter with FPGA, 11 th International Conference on Communication Systems and Network Technologies, CSNT-2022, 22-23 April 2022. Shital Ganorkar, Shekhar Sharma, Anjana Jain, Soft Computing Algorithms and Implementation on FPGA- A Review, International Conference on Smart Data Intelligence, ICSMDI 2021, Tirchy, 29-30 April 2021. Shekhar Sharma, Sumant Katiyal, L.D Arya, Design of Adaptive filter using a Novel Algorithm Jaya for Identification of Non-Linear Systems, IEEE International Conference on Computing for Sustainable Global Development,INDIACom-2017 , 1st – 3rd March, 2017 BVICAM, New Delhi Shekhar Sharma, Sumant Katiyal, L.D Arya, “Identification of Parameters of Digital IIR Filters Using Teaching-Learning Optimization Algorithm and Statistical Inference Comparison with Particle Swarm Optimization Algorithms,” IEEE International Conference on Computing for Sustainable Global Development, INDIACom-2016 ,16th – 18th March, 2016 ,BVICAM, New Delhi Shekhar Sharma, Sumant Katiyal, L.D Arya, “An improved Teaching-Learning-Based Optimization Algorithm applied to the design of linear phase digital FIR filter,” IEEE International Conference on Computing for Sustainable Global Development, INDIACom-2015 , 11th – 13th March, 2015 , BVICAM, New Delhi Shekhar Sharma, Sumant Katiyal, L.D Arya, “Design of linear-phase digital FIR filter using differential evolution optimization with ripple constraint,” IEEE International Conference on Computing for Sustainable Global Development, INDIACom-2014 , 5th – 6th March, 2014 , BVICAM, New Delhi Kamlesh Gupta, Mahima Mehta, Shekhar Sharma, Anjana Jain and Preeti Trivedi, “A performance comparison of zero forcing and MMSE equalization techniques to minimize ISI in a noisy environment,” International Conference of IETE ICETTC-2007 , 10th -11th Jan. 2007, IETE Mumbai Centre Kamlesh Gupta, Mahima Mehta, Shekhar Sharma, Anjana Jain and Preeti Trivedi, “Approaches to Minimizing the Effects of Residual ISI in Statistical sense,” International Conference on Advanced Communication Systems, ICACS-2007 , 10th -12th Jan., 2007, Govt. College of Technology, Coimbatore. Narendra Prasad and Shekhar Sharma, “Performance evaluation of hybrid echo canceller based on adaptive filter,” International conference, , ICNGN 2006 , 10th-11th Feb. 2006 , IETE Mumbai Centre. Dipak Adhyaru, Shekhar Sharma, Ashish Thakur and Apurva Gaiwak, “Detection of QRS complex for ECG using Median filter,” 2nd International Conference on Knowledge Management i-Maze , 21st -23rd Oct. 2002 ,IIPS, DAVV, Indore. Rupesh Dubey and Shekhar Sharma, “Implementation of the BPSK Modulator on the TMS 320C6713, DSP Processor using CCSv 3.1,” National conference on Emerging Trends in Electronics Engg. and Tech., ETEET- 08 , 2008, Ujjain, 2008. Dipak P. Patil, Shekhar Sharma and D.P. Sonavane, “Architecture for Reed- Solomon Codes,” National conference on current trends in Technology, NUCONE-2006 , 30th Nov. - 2nd Dec., 2006. R. Narendra Prasad and Shekhar Sharma, “Linear predictive filter and its performance analysis,” National Conference on Broad band Communication, NCBBCOM -2005 , 11th -12th Feb., 2005. BOOK CHAPTER :- Sonali Bali, Shekhar Sharma, PreetiTrivedi, “A Novel BPSO-Based Optimal Features for Handwritten Character Recognition Using SVM Classifier“ in Springer Book titled “Ambient Communications and Computer Systems” Feb. 2020. Projects: S.No. Type Title Year 1 Testing & Consultancy: S.No. Type Title Year 1 Other Details: List of Conferences/Workshops/Seminars Organized: Coordinator for two days seminar on “Mathematical Techniques in Wireless Networks” , SGSITS Indore under TEQIP-III, October 27-27,2017 Organizing Committee member for two days workshop on “Academic Institute Satellite and Launching” , SGSITS Indore under TEQIP-II, February 17-18, 2017. Organizing Committee member for one day seminar on “Communication and Cryptography”, SGSITS Indore under TEQIP-II, April 30, 2016. Coordinator for one day workshop on “PG Project Initiative: Institute Industry Interaction” SGSITS Indore under TEQIP-II, August 12, 2016. Organizing Committee member for one week workshop on “Fundamentals and Applications of SDR and MIMO communication”, SGSITS Indore under TEQIP-II, November 30- December 04, 2015. Organizing Committee member for one week STTP on “Application of Embedded System in Wireless Communication”, SGSITS Indore under TEQIP-II, August 10-14, 2015. Organizing Committee member for one week STTP on “Recent Trends in Communication Networks”, SGSITS Indore under TEQIP-II, December 08-12, 2014. Coordinator for one week STTP on ”Fundamental and Application of Wireless Communication”, SGSITS Indore under TEQIP-II, January 27-31 2014 Coordinator for two week ISTE workshop on “Signals and Systems”, SGSITS Indore (Conducted by IIT-Kharagpur), January 02-12, 2014. Organizing Committee member for one week STTP on “Soft computing Techniques in RF & Microwave”, SGSITS Indore under TEQIP-II, December 02-06, 2013. Invited Lectures/Expert Talks/Chairmanships at Conferences: Invited for delivering an Expert lecture on “Information Theory and Coding” at Indore institute of Science and Technology, Indore on December 26, 2011.
